text.message: I’ve got a bass. Back just goes straight down to my legs
i'll trade my buns for wheat

i didnt move there first time
Blue, I love about an hour from you.
You can love on me as long as u like
Oops. I’m just across the river in Illinois.. so maybe?
Where’d you go to high school my friend
Jerseyville, it’s just norhh th of Alton.
I lived in ur moms house
Red what did you do to them.. did you smother them
do u want to end the game?
Sorry had to knock out some squats
Glutes got a great pump goin now
this guy cant stop doing squats
this is gonna be a long game
